title: Keano Brown murder case postponed to 2026
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The murder case against the 30-year-old Claytin Williams, who is accused of fatally stabbing Keano Brown (23) in Ext 13, Mossel Bay, on the night of 6 July, has been postponed to January next year.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The murder case against the 30-year-old Claytin Williams, who is accused of fatally stabbing Keano Brown (23) in Ext 13, Mossel Bay, on the night of 6 July, has been postponed to January next year."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Williams appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court on 23 October when the case was transferred to the regional court. He is expected to make his first appearance in this court on 16 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Brown was stabbed in Cob Street and rushed to a nearby hospital where he later died from his wounds. Williams was arrested that same evening.","html":"Brown was stabbed in Cob Street and rushed to a nearby hospital where he later died from his wounds. Williams was arrested that same evening."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles: "},{"type":"list","items":["Mossel Bay local Keano Brown (23) murdered","More than 800 attend Keano Brown's funeral"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Keano Brown murder case postponed to 2026
